compiled_state.title: Implement .archived marker fast-skip in reduce_all_tickets() in ticket-reducer.py
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## What
Modify reduce_all_tickets() in plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py to skip event replay for ticket dirs that have an .archived marker file.

## Implementation

In the loop body inside reduce_all_tickets(), before the reduce_ticket() call, add:

```python
# Fast-skip: if .archived marker present and we are excluding archived tickets,
# skip expensive event replay entirely.
if exclude_archived and os.path.exists(os.path.join(entry_path, '.archived')):
    continue
```

For the exclude_archived=False path (fallback): do NOT skip — still call reduce_ticket() to return correct state (this is the crash-injection fallback path for markers that weren't written).

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py (MODIFY — add 4-5 lines in reduce_all_tickets() loop)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests from T3 now pass (both test_reduce_all_tickets_skips_dir_with_archived_marker and test_reduce_all_tickets_fallback_without_marker_correct_state)
  Verify: python3 -m pytest $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py::test_reduce_all_tickets_skips_dir_with_archived_marker $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py::test_reduce_all_tickets_fallback_without_marker_correct_state
- [ ] All existing test_ticket_reducer.py tests still pass
  Verify: python3 -m pytest $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py
- [ ] ruff lint passes
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
